name: Financial & Accounting
description: Financial statements, quality of earnings, working capital, and the numbers a buyer will independently re-verify.

name: Operations & Suppliers
description: Process, capacity, vendors, and the operational continuity a buyer underwrites at close.

name: Organization & People
description: Org chart, key-person dependency, compensation, and the culture that has to survive integration.

name: Customers, Sales & Marketing
description: Customer concentration, contracts, channel relationships, and the durability of the demand engine.

name: Offering & Intellectual Property
description: The product or service, its specifications and certifications, liability exposure, and clean company ownership of intellectual property.

name: Facilities, IT, Compliance & Insurance
description: Permits, environmental, IT, insurance, and regulatory standing.

name: Corporate, Legal & Contracts
description: Corporate records, cap table, material contracts, litigation, and the legal cleanliness of the transfer.
